projectsError: Could not load projects from the cluster.
noProjects: No projects contain a Route labeled admin=rhea
adminConsolesPickProjectBody: Choose a project from the sidebar to list Routes labeled admin=rhea and open their admin UIs.
adminConsolesLoadFailedTitle: Could not load Routes for this project
adminConsolesNoneInProjectBody: Create a Route in this project with label admin=rhea. The URL uses spec.host (https when spec.tls is set) and spec.path, unless you override with annotation rhea.redhat.com/console-url.
adminConsolesSelectTab: Select a tab above to open an admin console.
consoleNoUrlBody: Ensure the Route has spec.host (or status.ingress host) once admitted, or set annotation {{annotation}} to a full https:// URL.
